subject: System Outage - URGENT
body_template:
Hello {{ receiver_name }},

Our service has been down for the last {{ random_hours }} hours and it is impacting our users. When will this be fixed?

Best,
{{ sender_name }}

subject: Lunch today?
body_template:
Hey,
Anyone want to grab pizza for lunch around 12:30?

Cheers,
{{ sender_name }}

subject: Board Deck Missing Slides
body_template:
{{ receiver_name }},
We need the missing Q3 slides for the board deck by EOD. Please confirm when ready.

Thanks,
{{ sender_name }} (CEO)
